title: Surgeon Vacancy at Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises:
Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises!
